title: Email Validation Service Input
description: Provide one or more emails to validate and choose how strict the evaluation should be.

emails.title: Emails
emails.description: List of email addresses to validate.

validationProfile.title: Validation profile
validationProfile.description: Controls how strict the final decision should be.

checkTemporaryEmail.title: Check temporary email providers
checkTemporaryEmail.description: Detects whether an email uses a disposable or short-lived mailbox provider.

checkSmtp.title: Check SMTP reachability
checkSmtp.description: Checks whether the destination mail system is reachable and appears to accept messages.

checkDll.title: Check DLL/domain blocklists
checkDll.description: Screens domains against known risky or blocked-domain lists.

deduplicateEmails.title: Remove duplicates
deduplicateEmails.description: Processes each unique email only once per run.

includeReasonDetails.title: Include reason details
includeReasonDetails.description: Includes human-readable reasons that explain how each decision was reached.
